meta.title: DEF CON 32 - Changing Global Threat Landscape - Rob Joyce, The Dark Tangent
meta.description: Rob Joyce, former NSA and White House cyber official, will engage with Dark Tangent to analyze the evolving state of global cyber threats. Their discussion will explore the impact and potential of artificial intelligence, assessing how AI is reshaping the cybersecurity landscape and what it means for the future of global security.
